apis.name: project_by_name
apis.sql: SELECT id, project_code, name FROM api_project WHERE name ILIKE '%{keyword}%'

apis.name: active_press_projects
apis.sql: SELECT id, project_code, name, status FROM api_project WHERE status = 'in_progress' AND name ILIKE '%프레스%' ORDER BY id

apis.name: project_status_values
apis.sql: SELECT DISTINCT status FROM api_project ORDER BY status

apis.name: active_projects
apis.sql: SELECT id, project_code, name, status, customer_name, delivery_date, progress FROM api_project WHERE status = 'in_progress' ORDER BY delivery_date

apis.name: nc_recent
apis.sql: SELECT r.id, r.nonconformance_type, r.importance, r.title, r.description, p.name AS project_name, u.username AS reporter, r.created_at FROM api_nonconformancereport r LEFT JOIN api_project p ON p.id = r.project_id LEFT JOIN auth_user u ON u.id = r.reporter_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 50

apis.name: nc_by_project
apis.sql: SELECT r.id, r.nonconformance_type, r.importance, r.title, r.description, u.username AS reporter, r.created_at FROM api_nonconformancereport r LEFT JOIN api_project p ON p.id = r.project_id LEFT JOIN auth_user u ON u.id = r.reporter_id WHERE p.project_code = '{project_code}' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

apis.name: orders_list
apis.sql: SELECT id, order_number, customer_name, project_name, product_type, quantity, order_date, delivery_date, order_status, sales_person FROM api_order ORDER BY order_date DESC LIMIT 50

apis.name: project_schedule
apis.sql: SELECT ds.task_name, ds.task_type, ds.planned_start_date, ds.planned_end_date, ds.actual_start_date, ds.actual_end_date, ds.progress_percent, ds.status FROM api_projectdetailedschedule ds JOIN api_project p ON p.id = ds.project_id WHERE p.project_code = '{project_code}' ORDER BY ds.planned_start_date

apis.name: shipment_recent
apis.sql: SELECT id, doc_no, status, shipment_no, project_name, customer, shipment_date, export_date, serial_no FROM shipment_table ORDER BY shipment_date DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50

apis.name: shipment_by_status
apis.sql: SELECT id, doc_no, status, shipment_no, project_name, customer, shipment_date, serial_no FROM shipment_table WHERE status = '{status}' ORDER BY shipment_date DESC LIMIT 50

apis.description: CS 재고 중 양품 수량 0인 항목
apis.name: cs_inventory_zero
apis.sql: SELECT item_cd, item_nm, spec, stock_qty, good_qty, bad_qty FROM csagent.api_cs_inventory WHERE good_qty = 0 ORDER BY item_cd

apis.description: 중요도별 기한 초과 미조치 부적합 목록 (critical=3일, high=7일, medium=14일, low=30일) — importance 파라미터로 필터 가능
apis.name: nc_overdue
apis.sql: SELECT r.id, r.importance, r.title, p.name AS project_name, CONCAT(u.last_name, u.first_name) AS reporter, am.username AS action_manager_username, CONCAT(am.last_name, am.first_name) AS action_manager_name, (r.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::text AS created_kst, EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - r.created_at)::int - CASE r.importance WHEN 'critical' THEN 3 WHEN 'high' THEN 7 WHEN 'medium' THEN 14 WHEN 'low' THEN 30 ELSE 14 END AS overdue_days FROM api_nonconformancereport r LEFT JOIN api_project p ON p.id = r.project_id LEFT JOIN auth_user u ON u.id = r.reporter_id LEFT JOIN auth_user am ON am.id = r.action_manager_id WHERE (r.action_result IS NULL OR r.action_result = '') AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - r.created_at) > CASE r.importance WHEN 'critical' THEN 3 WHEN 'high' THEN 7 WHEN 'medium' THEN 14 WHEN 'low' THEN 30 ELSE 14 END AND ('{importance}' = 'all' OR r.importance = '{importance}') ORDER BY CASE r.importance WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, r.created_at ASC

apis.description: 중요도별 미조치 요약 — 총 미조치, 납기위험(D-30 이내 진행중 프로젝트), 이번 주 조치 완료 건수
apis.name: nc_weekly_summary
apis.sql: SELECT r.importance, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.action_result IS NULL OR r.action_result = '') as total_open, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (r.action_result IS NULL OR r.action_result = '') AND p.delivery_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '30 days' AND p.status NOT IN ('완료', '취소', 'completed', 'cancelled')) as delivery_risk, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.action_result IS NOT NULL AND r.action_result != '' AND r.updated_at >= date_trunc('week', NOW())) as closed_this_week FROM api_nonconformancereport r LEFT JOIN api_project p ON p.id = r.project_id GROUP BY r.importance ORDER BY CASE r.importance WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

apis.description: 이번 주(월요일 00:00 KST 이후) 신규 등록 부적합 목록
apis.name: nc_new_this_week
apis.sql: SELECT r.id, r.importance, r.title, p.name AS project_name, CONCAT(u.last_name, u.first_name) AS reporter, (r.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::text AS created_kst FROM api_nonconformancereport r LEFT JOIN api_project p ON p.id = r.project_id LEFT JOIN auth_user u ON u.id = r.reporter_id WHERE r.created_at >= date_trunc('week', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
